title: galium pumilum subsp. fleurotii
intro: Galium pumilum subsp. fleurotii, also known as Fleurot's bedstraw or Galium fleurotii, is a plant species of the Rubiaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Galium pumilum subsp. fleurotii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used topically as a poultice or salve.
